question: Wales vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina: O/U 3.5
description:
In the upcoming World Cup Europe Qualifiers game between Wales and Bosnia and Herzegovina, scheduled for March 26 at 3:45 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Wales and Bosnia and Herzegovina combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Wales vs. Bosnia and Herzegovina - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the World Cup Europe Qualifiers game, scheduled for March 26 at 3:45 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Wales commands trader consensus as favorites in their UEFA Nations League Group B3 home clash against Bosnia and Herzegovina at Cardiff City Stadium, fueled by a perfect start with two wins and six points atop the standings. Bosnia sits third with just one point, hampered by a 1-2 loss to Northern Ireland and a winless run in five away qualifiers. Wales leverages unbeaten home form across five recent internationals, with Callum Wilson and Harry Wilson in sharp scoring touch despite defensive injury concerns like Ben Davies' absence. Bosnia's aging squad lacks Dzeko's firepower, exposing vulnerabilities against set pieces. Stakes rise with Iceland looming next, amplifying Wales' momentum edge in this pivotal matchup.

events.title: Türkiye vs. Romania - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the World Cup Europe Qualifiers game, scheduled for March 26 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Turkey enters this matchup as clear favorites in trader consensus, with odds reflecting their stronger recent form and home advantage in Istanbul for this UEFA Nations League qualifier. Key driver: Arda Güler's full recovery from injury bolsters midfield creativity, while Romania grapples with defender Radu Drăgușin's suspension, weakening their backline against Turkey's pacey attack led by Kerem Aktürkoğlu. Recent developments include Turkey's three-match unbeaten streak versus Romania's road struggles, conceding in their last four away games. Upcoming factors like fatigue from club schedules and weather could tilt edges, but wisdom of crowds prices Turkey win at 65% implied probability, underscoring historical dominance in head-to-heads. Upsets remain possible in volatile international play.

question: Will Fidesz-KDNP win <70 seats in the Hungarian National Assembly in this election?
description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Hungary on April 12, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the number of seats won by Fidesz-KDNP in the Hungarian National Assembly (Országgyűlés) as a result of this election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest range bracket.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the specified coalition. If the specified coalition dissolves prior to the election, this market will resolve based on the total number of seats won by the two component parties.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based on the official results as reported by the Hungarian government, specifically the Hungarian Election Authority (Nemzeti Választási Iroda) (valasztas.hu).

events.title: # of seats won by Fidesz-KDNP in Hungary parliamentary election?
events.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Hungary on April 12, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the number of seats won by Fidesz-KDNP in the Hungarian National Assembly (Országgyűlés) as a result of this election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest range bracket.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the specified coalition. If the specified coalition dissolves prior to the election, this market will resolve based on the total number of seats won by the two component parties.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based on the official results as reported by the Hungarian government, specifically the Hungarian Election Authority (Nemzeti Választási Iroda) (valasztas.hu).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on Fidesz-KDNP's seat haul in Hungary's 2026 parliamentary election hinges on neck-and-neck polls, with Viktor Orbán's ruling alliance at 40-45% and Péter Magyar's Tisza party surging to 30-35% amid anti-corruption momentum and economic discontent. Fragmented opposition previously favored Fidesz's district dominance under Hungary's mixed electoral system, but Tisza's consolidation of protest votes has narrowed projected seats to 70-114 range, per models, eroding supermajority odds. Recent EU fund releases and Orbán's Ukraine stance provide tailwinds, yet inflation and graft scandals sustain pressure. Fresh polls, campaign gaffes, or economic shifts could decisively tilt toward majority retention or loss.

This market will resolve according to the number of seats won by Fidesz-KDNP in the Hungarian National Assembly (Országgyűlés) as a result of this election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest range bracket.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the specified coalition. If the specified coalition dissolves prior to the election, this market will resolve based on the total number of seats won by the two component parties.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based on the official results as reported by the Hungarian government, specifically the Hungarian Election Authority (Nemzeti Választási Iroda) (valasztas.hu).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on Fidesz-KDNP's seat haul in Hungary's 2026 parliamentary election hinges on neck-and-neck polls, with Viktor Orbán's ruling alliance at 40-45% and Péter Magyar's Tisza party surging to 30-35% amid anti-corruption momentum and economic discontent. Fragmented opposition previously favored Fidesz's district dominance under Hungary's mixed electoral system, but Tisza's consolidation of protest votes has narrowed projected seats to 70-114 range, per models, eroding supermajority odds. Recent EU fund releases and Orbán's Ukraine stance provide tailwinds, yet inflation and graft scandals sustain pressure. Fresh polls, campaign gaffes, or economic shifts could decisively tilt toward majority retention or loss.

events.title: Jamshedpur FC vs. Mumbai City FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Indian Super League game, scheduled for Thursday, April 9, 2026 between Jamshedpur FC and Mumbai City FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus splits nearly even between Mumbai City FC (52%) and Jamshedpur FC (51%) for their ISL showdown, reflecting razor-thin margins in recent form and head-to-head battles. Mumbai City rides a five-match unbeaten streak with potent scoring from Vikram Pratap Singh, but faces a stern test at Jamshedpur's JRD Tata Sports Complex, where the hosts boast a rock-solid home defense conceding just 0.8 goals per game lately. Jamshedpur's resurgence under coach Jose Francisco Molina, highlighted by back-to-back wins, counters Mumbai's edge, especially with no major injuries reported on either side per official updates. This playoff-contending clash's history of 2-1 thrillers and draws keeps the race glued tight.

eventMetadata.context_description: Mumbai City FC's strong start to the ISL 2024-25 season, sitting atop the standings with an unbeaten record after four matches including a 3-1 win over Punjab FC, drives trader consensus favoring them against Jamshedpur FC, who sit mid-table with one win and two losses. Jamshedpur's home advantage at the JRD Tata Sports Complex could narrow the gap, but Mumbai's attacking firepower led by Yoella and Bipin Singh exploits defensive lapses seen in Jamshedpur's recent 1-1 draw with NorthEast United. question: Will Trump post "Ass" on Truth Social this week?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if @realDonaldTrump posts/truths the listed term between March 16, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and March 22, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market, all text posted by the listed account in quote and reply posts/truths count toward a "Yes" resolution, but quoted posts/truths and reposts/reTruths will not count.

Text posted in images, memes, or other non-animated, non-video media that are not strictly text will qualify towards a "Yes" resolution only if the listed term is spelled out clearly and in full. (e.g., words spelled out in a letter posted as a .jpg will qualify, however a word posted as part of an animated .gif will not.)

Any plural or possessive forms of a listed term, as well as variance in capitalizations, will count toward the resolution of this market, regardless of context. Other forms of the listed term will NOT count.

Extraneous symbols being inserted into a word (ex: r@d1cal, for "radical") will disqualify it from counting toward a "Yes" resolution.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all grammatical or slang forms, or misspellings with extra, missing, or incorrect letters (ex: helloooooooo or heoll, for ‘hello’), will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

The resolution source for this market will be Donald Trumps's verified Truth Social account: @realDonaldTrump

Please note, only the @realDonaldTrump verified Truth Social account counts for this market, regardless of the URL for this profile. If Donald Trump posts/truths from another account, it has no bearing on the resolution of this market.

Note: "Mutilization" must be written verbatim in order to qualify, any additional riffs on spelling or grammatical variations will not be considered, nor will the proper word "Mutilation". Differences in capitalization will qualify.

events.title: What will Trump post this week? (March 16 - March 22)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if @realDonaldTrump posts/truths the listed term between March 16, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and March 22, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market, all text posted by the listed account in quote and reply posts/truths count toward a "Yes" resolution, but quoted posts/truths and reposts/reTruths will not count.

Text posted in images, memes, or other non-animated, non-video media that are not strictly text will qualify towards a "Yes" resolution only if the listed term is spelled out clearly and in full. (e.g., words spelled out in a letter posted as a .jpg will qualify, however a word posted as part of an animated .gif will not.)

Any plural or possessive forms of a listed term, as well as variance in capitalizations, will count toward the resolution of this market, regardless of context. Other forms of the listed term will NOT count.

Extraneous symbols being inserted into a word (ex: r@d1cal, for "radical") will disqualify it from counting toward a "Yes" resolution.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all grammatical or slang forms, or misspellings with extra, missing, or incorrect letters (ex: helloooooooo or heoll, for ‘hello’), will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

The resolution source for this market will be Donald Trumps's verified Truth Social account: @realDonaldTrump

Please note, only the @realDonaldTrump verified Truth Social account counts for this market, regardless of the URL for this profile. If Donald Trump posts/truths from another account, it has no bearing on the resolution of this market.

Note: "Mutilization" must be written verbatim in order to qualify, any additional riffs on spelling or grammatical variations will not be considered, nor will the proper word "Mutilation". Differences in capitalization will qualify.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trump's prolific Truth Social activity, averaging dozens of posts daily on legal battles and political opponents, anchors trader consensus for his March 16-22 output, with odds favoring mentions of the New York civil fraud case bond deadline looming March 25 and the March 19 Florida Republican primary. Recent posts have intensified attacks on Judge Engoron and New York AG Letitia James amid the $464 million judgment appeal, while hyping primary sweeps against Nikki Haley. Upcoming Florida voting and potential campaign announcements could prompt victory boasts or fraud claims, though traders note his pattern of reacting to Biden critiques or media coverage, underscoring uncertainty in exact phrasing amid fluid news cycles.

For the purposes of this market, all text posted by the listed account in quote and reply posts/truths count toward a "Yes" resolution, but quoted posts/truths and reposts/reTruths will not count.

Text posted in images, memes, or other non-animated, non-video media that are not strictly text will qualify towards a "Yes" resolution only if the listed term is spelled out clearly and in full. (e.g., words spelled out in a letter posted as a .jpg will qualify, however a word posted as part of an animated .gif will not.)

Any plural or possessive forms of a listed term, as well as variance in capitalizations, will count toward the resolution of this market, regardless of context. Other forms of the listed term will NOT count.

Extraneous symbols being inserted into a word (ex: r@d1cal, for "radical") will disqualify it from counting toward a "Yes" resolution.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all grammatical or slang forms, or misspellings with extra, missing, or incorrect letters (ex: helloooooooo or heoll, for ‘hello’), will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

The resolution source for this market will be Donald Trumps's verified Truth Social account: @realDonaldTrump

Please note, only the @realDonaldTrump verified Truth Social account counts for this market, regardless of the URL for this profile. If Donald Trump posts/truths from another account, it has no bearing on the resolution of this market.

Note: "Mutilization" must be written verbatim in order to qualify, any additional riffs on spelling or grammatical variations will not be considered, nor will the proper word "Mutilation". Differences in capitalization will qualify.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trump's prolific Truth Social activity, averaging dozens of posts daily on legal battles and political opponents, anchors trader consensus for his March 16-22 output, with odds favoring mentions of the New York civil fraud case bond deadline looming March 25 and the March 19 Florida Republican primary. Recent posts have intensified attacks on Judge Engoron and New York AG Letitia James amid the $464 million judgment appeal, while hyping primary sweeps against Nikki Haley. Upcoming Florida voting and potential campaign announcements could prompt victory boasts or fraud claims, though traders note his pattern of reacting to Biden critiques or media coverage, underscoring uncertainty in exact phrasing amid fluid news cycles.

question: US x Iran ceasefire by December 31?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if there is an official ceasefire agreement, defined as a publicly announced and mutually agreed halt in direct military engagement, between the United States and Iran by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, an “official ceasefire agreement” requires clear public confirmation from both the United States government and the government of Iran that they have agreed to halt military hostilities against one another.

If the agreement is officially reached before the resolution date, this market will resolve to “Yes,” regardless of whether the ceasefire officially takes effect after the resolution date.

Any form of informal understanding, backchannel communication, de-escalation without an announced agreement, or unilateral pause in hostilities will not be considered an official ceasefire. Humanitarian pauses, limited operational pauses, or temporary tactical stand-downs will not count toward the resolution of this market.

A broader peace deal, normalization agreement, or political framework will qualify only if it includes a publicly announced and mutually agreed halt in military engagement between the United States and Iran, effective on a specified date, or otherwise confirmed by an overwhelming consensus of credible reporting. Agreements that outline future negotiations or de-escalation measures without an explicit, dated commitment to stop fighting will not qualify.

This market’s resolution will be based on official statements from the United States government and the government of Iran. However, a wide consensus of credible media reporting confirming that an official ceasefire agreement has been reached will suffice.

eventMetadata.context_description: Escalating Israel-Iran exchanges and Iran's proxy attacks via Hezbollah and Houthis drive low trader consensus for a US-Iran ceasefire, as Washington prioritizes Israel's security amid stalled nuclear talks. Recent developments include Israel's October 26 strikes on Iranian missile sites following Tehran's limited barrage, with US forces aiding defenses but urging restraint to avoid wider war. Biden administration channels through Oman yielded no breakthroughs, per official readouts, while Tehran demands sanctions relief unmet by demands for verifiable nuclear curbs. Upcoming US election results could pivot policy—Trump favors pressure, Harris continuity—keeping odds depressed amid high uncertainty in diplomatic momentum.

question: Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by December 31?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a continuous 14-day period without any qualifying military action between Iran, and Israel and the United States that begins at any time between market creation and the specified end date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No". 

The 14-day period may begin at any time between the creation of this market and the specified end date (ET), and must continue uninterrupted through 12:00 PM ET on the 14th calendar day after the strike is confirmed. 

A "military action" is defined as any use of force by Iran, or Israel and the United States against the other’s soil, or official embassies or consulates, that is either officially acknowledged by the acting government or confirmed through a clear consensus of credible reporting. 

This includes, but is not limited to, airstrikes, naval attacks, and ground incursions. 

Cyberattacks, sanctions, and diplomatic actions do not count. 

Only actions by Iranian forces explicitly claimed by the Islamic Republic of Iran, or confirmed to have originated from Iranian territory will qualify as Iranian military actions. Attacks on Israel or the US by proxy forces (i.e. Hezbollah, Houthis, etc.) will not count.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent Israeli airstrikes on Iranian military targets on October 26, following Iran's October 1 missile barrage, have tempered escalation risks without provoking a major Iranian retaliation, driving trader consensus toward prolonged but contained Iran-Israel/US tensions. Iran's downplayed response and focus on proxies like Hezbollah—amid Israel's Lebanon ground offensive—suggests no immediate full-scale war, though sporadic exchanges persist. Diplomatic calls from the US, G7, and UN for restraint add de-escalation pressure, but unresolved Gaza/Hezbollah fronts and the US presidential election on November 5 could shift dynamics. Markets reflect uncertainty, with "wisdom of crowds" pricing extended timelines over swift resolution.

question: Will GERB-SDS (GERB–SDS) win the most seats in the 2026 Bulgarian parliamentary election?
description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Bulgaria on April 19, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed political party or coalition that wins the greatest number of seats in the Bulgarian National Assembly as a result of this election.

If the results are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties or coalitions for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order. If no abbreviation is listed, the listed name will be used.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party or coalition in the Bulgarian Parliament. If a named coalition dissolves, this market will resolve based on the seat total of the constituent party within that coalition that held the largest number of seats before the election.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Bulgarian government, specifically the Central Election Commission of Bulgaria (Tsentralna Izbiratelna Komisia) (https://www.cik.bg/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns an 86.5% implied probability to PB winning Bulgaria's snap parliamentary election on October 27, driven by its commanding leads in the latest national polls from Gallup International and Alpha Research, where PB polls 28-32% support amid opposition fragmentation. GERB-SDS trails at 11% odds, reflecting its 22-25% polling but hampered by past coalition failures and voter fatigue from six prior elections since 2021. Recent catalysts include PB's gains from stability messaging on EU funds and inflation, plus a key debate win last week, while minor parties like MECH (1.3%) and APS (0.9%) lack broad appeal. Odds for PP-DB, BSP, and others remain under 1% due to base erosion; watch final turnout estimates for shifts.

events.title: Bulgaria Parliamentary Election Winner
events.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Bulgaria on April 19, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed political party or coalition that wins the greatest number of seats in the Bulgarian National Assembly as a result of this election.

If the results are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties or coalitions for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition that received a greater number of valid votes. In the event that results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party or coalition whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order. If no abbreviation is listed, the listed name will be used.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party or coalition in the Bulgarian Parliament. If a named coalition dissolves, this market will resolve based on the seat total of the constituent party within that coalition that held the largest number of seats before the election.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Bulgarian government, specifically the Central Election Commission of Bulgaria (Tsentralna Izbiratelna Komisia) (https://www.cik.bg/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns an 86.5% implied probability to PB winning Bulgaria's snap parliamentary election on October 27, driven by its commanding leads in the latest national polls from Gallup International and Alpha Research, where PB polls 28-32% support amid opposition fragmentation. GERB-SDS trails at 11% odds, reflecting its 22-25% polling but hampered by past coalition failures and voter fatigue from six prior elections since 2021. Recent catalysts include PB's gains from stability messaging on EU funds and inflation, plus a key debate win last week, while minor parties like MECH (1.3%) and APS (0.9%) lack broad appeal. Odds for PP-DB, BSP, and others remain under 1% due to base erosion; watch final turnout estimates for shifts.

question: Legends Cricket League: Konark Suryas Odisha vs Southern Super Stars
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Konark Suryas Odisha and Southern Super Stars scheduled for March 13 2026 in Legends Cricket League.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

description:

In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.

If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

question: Legends Cricket League: Konark Suryas Odisha vs Southern Super Stars - Most Sixes Konark Suryas Odisha Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between Konark Suryas Odisha and Southern Super Stars scheduled for 2026-03-13 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Konark Suryas Odisha will be considered correct if Konark Suryas Odisha is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Southern Super Stars.The outcome corresponding to Southern Super Stars will be considered correct if Southern Super Stars is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Konark Suryas Odisha.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus in the Legends Cricket League market for most sixes between Konark Suryas Odisha and Southern Super Stars reflects razor-thin margins, with a draw at 50% implied probability edging out SOU (49.5%) and KON (49%), signaling evenly matched power-hitting lineups in this T20 showdown. In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Legends Cricket League: Daredevils Delhi vs India Tigers
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Daredevils Delhi and India Tigers scheduled for March 15 2026 in Legends Cricket League.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

question: Legends Cricket League: Mumbai Spartans vs Konark Suryas Odisha
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Mumbai Spartans and Konark Suryas Odisha scheduled for March 17 2026 in Legends Cricket League.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

question: Legends Cricket League: Daredevils Delhi vs Royal Riders Punjab
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Daredevils Delhi and Royal Riders Punjab scheduled for March 18 2026 in Legends Cricket League.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between Daredevils Delhi and Royal Riders Punjab scheduled for 2026-03-18 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Daredevils Delhi will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from Daredevils Delhi.
The outcome corresponding to Royal Riders Punjab will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from Royal Riders Punjab.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Legends Cricket League: Mumbai Spartans vs Southern Super Stars
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Mumbai Spartans and Southern Super Stars scheduled for March 19 2026 in Legends Cricket League.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

question: Legends Cricket League: Mumbai Spartans vs Southern Super Stars - Toss Match Double Mumbai Spartans Winner
description:
This market refers to the combination of the pre-match coin toss and the final match result for the cricket match between Mumbai Spartans and Southern Super Stars scheduled for 2026-03-19 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to (1) the official toss result and (2) the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Mumbai Spartans will be considered correct if  Mumbai Spartans is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
The outcome corresponding to Southern Super Stars will be considered correct if Southern Super Stars is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.
DLS/DRS adjustments, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, Super Over, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a match winner are treated as ordinary wins. If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the tiebreak winner will be considered the match winner for this market. If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

question: Legends Cricket League: Mumbai Spartans vs Southern Super Stars - Most Sixes Mumbai Spartans Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between Mumbai Spartans and Southern Super Stars scheduled for 2026-03-19 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Mumbai Spartans will be considered correct if Mumbai Spartans is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Southern Super Stars.The outcome corresponding to Southern Super Stars will be considered correct if Southern Super Stars is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Mumbai Spartans.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Will the Social Democrats be part of the next Government of Denmark?
description:
A Parliamentary election is scheduled to be held in Denmark on March 24, 2026.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed political party is included in the first Danish government formed after the 2026 Danish parliamentary election. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market may resolve once the first government is officially confirmed following the appointment of the Prime Minister and ministers by the monarch after the 2026 Danish parliamentary election, with ministers sworn in under non-caretaker circumstances.

A party will only be considered part of the government if it participates in the governing coalition and provides at least one cabinet minister. Parties that merely support the government from outside the cabinet (e.g., through parliamentary support agreements or similar arrangements) without holding a cabinet post will not qualify.

If no government is formed, or the results are not known definitively by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve based on a consensus of credible reporting. In case of ambiguity, this market will resolve based on official information from the Government of Denmark.

eventMetadata.context_description: Social Democrats' consistent lead in recent polls, averaging 27-30% support, anchors trader consensus for their inclusion in Denmark's next government, due after the Folketing election by June 2026. The current minority coalition with Liberals and Moderates remains stable amid ongoing budget negotiations, with no snap election signaled by Prime Minister Frederiksen. Fragmented opposition—Venstre at 15-18%, Conservatives rising slightly—suggests continued centrist pacts over ideological blocs, mirroring 2022 outcomes. Traders weigh multi-party dynamics under proportional representation, where post-election talks often yield broad support deals; watch October's state budget vote for coalition stress tests that could shift implied probabilities.

question: Will Predict.fun launch a token by March 31, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if predict.fun officially launches a governance token by 11:59 PM ET on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The token must be actively and publicly transferable and tradable. Announcements alone do not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from predict.fun (https://predict.fun/), however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

question: Will the Social Democrats win <35 seats in the Danish Folketing in the 2026 Danish general election?
description:
A Parliamentary election is scheduled to be held in Denmark on March 24, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the number of seats won by the listed party in the Danish Folketing (unicameral national legislature) as a result of this election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the specified party, not any coalition it may be part of.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results reported by Danish government sources such as the Ministry of Interior and Health (https://www.valg.im.dk/) and Statistics Denmark (https://www.dst.dk/en).

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent Danish opinion polls project the Social Democrats to secure 37-43 seats in the next parliamentary election, driving trader consensus toward the 35-39 (39%) and 40-44 (31%) ranges amid a fragmented multi-party landscape. The race remains tight due to rising support for center-right parties like the Liberals and Conservatives, alongside left-wing challengers eroding the Social Democrats' traditional base on welfare and climate policies. Key dynamics include fluctuating voter sentiment on economic pressures and immigration, with polls showing a narrow lead over rivals. Potential separators include a snap election call by Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen, major fiscal announcements, or shifts in coalition talks, all capable of swaying projected seat shares as traders weigh the wisdom of current pricing.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the specified party, not any coalition it may be part of.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. eventMetadata.context_description: Recent Danish opinion polls project the Social Democrats to secure 37-43 seats in the next parliamentary election, driving trader consensus toward the 35-39 (39%) and 40-44 (31%) ranges amid a fragmented multi-party landscape. The race remains tight due to rising support for center-right parties like the Liberals and Conservatives, alongside left-wing challengers eroding the Social Democrats' traditional base on welfare and climate policies. Key dynamics include fluctuating voter sentiment on economic pressures and immigration, with polls showing a narrow lead over rivals. Potential separators include a snap election call by Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen, major fiscal announcements, or shifts in coalition talks, all capable of swaying projected seat shares as traders weigh the wisdom of current pricing.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices the Green Left (Socialistisk Folkeparti, SF) at 20-24 seats with 47.5% implied probability in Denmark's snap parliamentary election on November 3, 2024, reflecting recent polls showing SF support at 11-13%—up from pre-announcement levels—translating to roughly 20-22 seats under the Sainte-Laguë allocation for 179 total Folketing seats. Key drivers include SF's steady polling gains amid Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen's sudden October 28 election call, triggered by immigration policy tensions, boosting left-leaning parties. Historical precedents from 2022 (SF's 15 seats) and short campaign dynamics add uncertainty, with <20 seats at 26% accounting for potential voter shifts, while higher bins remain less favored per current projections. Upcoming vote tallies will resolve markets.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent polls from major Danish pollsters like Voxmeter and Megafon place Liberal Alliance support at 10-13%, projecting 17-22 seats in the 179-seat Folketing under Denmark's proportional system, fueling trader consensus for 15-19 (53%) and 20-24 (38%) outcomes. This builds on their 15 seats from the 2022 election, with modest gains amid fragmented center-right competition and Social Democrat dominance. Key drivers include leader Alex Ahrendtsen's focus on tax cuts and welfare reform, steady voter base in urban areas, and no major scandals eroding support. Traders price low odds for extremes due to historical base rates around 15-25 seats; watch upcoming debates and final pre-election surveys for shifts before the vote.

question: Will Rumen Radev be the next prime minister of Bulgaria after the 2026 parliamentary election?
description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Bulgaria on April 19, 2026.

This market will resolve to the next individual who is officially sworn in as Prime Minister of Bulgaria following the next parliamentary election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is appointed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Bulgaria; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Rumen Radev's constitutional authority to nominate Bulgaria's next prime minister amid post-June snap election deadlock anchors trader consensus at 60% on him, reflecting his pivotal role in stalled coalition talks. Recent consultations saw GERB's Rosen Zhelyazkov (9.5%) and MRF's Delyan Peevski (10.5%) decline first and second exploratory mandates, propelling independent lawmaker Andrey Gyurov (12%) after Radev awarded him the third on October 22, with a deadline this week for a cabinet proposal. Revival's Kostadin Kostadinov (10%) and GERB leader Boyko Borissov (7%) trail amid fragmentation, as failure risks new elections and prolonged caretaker rule under Dimitar Glavchev.

question: Will Nikolai Denkov be the next prime minister of Bulgaria after the 2026 parliamentary election?
description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Bulgaria on April 19, 2026.

This market will resolve to the next individual who is officially sworn in as Prime Minister of Bulgaria following the next parliamentary election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is appointed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Bulgaria; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Right-Wing Wave in French Mayoral Elections?
description:
Municipal elections are scheduled in Paris, Marseille, and Lyon for March 15, with potential second rounds on March 22, 2026. 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the following candidates win their respective elections to become mayor: 

- Paris: 		Rachida Dati
- Marseille:	Franck Allisio
- Lyon:		Jean-Michel Aulas

If any of the listed candidates does not become mayor of their respective city as a result of the respective municipal elections, this market will resolve to “No”.

If the results of any of the specified elections are not known definitively by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

This market will resolve based on the election results, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the French Ministry of the Interior (élections.interieur.gouv.fr).

eventMetadata.context_description: Traders' near-unanimous 99.6% consensus on "No" for a right-wing wave in France's 2026 municipal elections reflects National Rally's (RN) persistent weakness in local contests, winning just 4 of 35 cities over 100,000 residents in 2020 despite national surges. Structural factors like high incumbency rates (over 80% re-election historically), low-turnout local voting, and coalitions blocking RN advances sustain this view, even after RN's strong 2024 European Parliament showing was blunted in legislative races by left-center pacts. Early 2026 polls show RN gains in mid-sized towns but no dominance in urban centers. Realistic shifts could arise from a national economic crisis, RN leadership consolidation, or Macron government collapse, though base rates favor status quo fragmentation.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus gives a 99.5% implied probability to a left-wing wave in French mayoral elections, driven by official first-round results from March 2026 municipals showing left-wing coalitions securing over 60% of major city seats, far exceeding pre-election polls. This builds on the New Popular Front's legislative success in 2024, with high urban turnout and tactical alliances boosting wins in Lyon, Lille, and Strasbourg against fragmented right-wing opposition. Key catalysts include endorsement shifts from centrists and low far-right mobilization. Though nearly locked, runoff disputes, court-mandated recounts, or abstention thresholds invalidating slim victories represent slim risks before final certifications next month.

question: Will Trump say "Affair" this week? (March 22)
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between March 16, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and March 22, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

question: Will the Social Democrats’ Popular Vote Margin of Victory in the 2026 Denmark Parliamentary Election be less than 5%?
description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Denmark on March 24, 2026. Denmark uses a proportional representation electoral system in which voters cast a single vote that may be given either to a specific candidate or to a political party list, with seats allocated proportionally based on the total votes received by each party.

This market will resolve according to the margin of victory between the top two parties in terms of votes in this election.

If the margin of victory falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

For the purposes of this market, the “margin of victory” is defined as the absolute difference between the percentages of valid votes received by the political party that wins the most votes nationwide and the political party that wins the second-most votes nationwide. Percentages of the valid votes received by each party will be determined by dividing the total number of valid votes each of the top two parties receives by the sum of all valid votes cast in the election in Denmark proper.

This market will resolve solely based on the total number of valid votes received by each political party nationwide in this election, based solely on the results from Denmark proper, excluding the results and eligible voter counts from Greenland and the Faroe Islands. Votes cast for individual candidates will count toward the total of the respective candidate’s political party.

If two or more parties tie for the most valid votes nationwide in this election, this market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results reported by Danish government sources such as the Ministry of Interior and Health (https://www.valg.im.dk/) and Statistics Denmark (https://www.dst.dk/en).

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent national polls drive trader consensus toward a Social Democrats popular vote margin of 5-10% in Denmark's next election, with averages showing the party at 27-30% versus 17-20% for closest rivals like Denmark Democrats or Liberals. Incumbent Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen's coalition stability, bolstered by welfare reforms and strict immigration policies, sustains this edge amid economic growth. Recent developments include Denmark Democrats' polling surge post-summer, narrowing leads from 12-15% in July to 7-10% now, while Liberal Party infighting caps challengers. Traders eye October budget votes and potential early election signals as key catalysts for shifts.
